_provenance.stage: Stage 6 — Synthesis (retroactive rebuild from Codex Stage 3)

revision_log: CORRECTED (Stage 3): INCORRECT — 'SUHAKAM estimates 500K-1M stateless children' → 'SUHAKAM-linked 2022 reporting estimates ... no official figure exists'.
CORRECTED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — 'no treaty obligation' → 'Malaysia is not bound by the 1961 Statelessness Convention; it is a party to the CRC with reservations on Article 7'.
REMOVED (Stage 3): UNVERIFIED — 'SUHAKAM has repeatedly recommended ratification of the 1961 Convention' (no specific source) replaced with 'Civil society has urged statelessness-reduction action'.
CORRECTED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — 'most visible affected group' → 'frequently cited affected group'.
CORRECTED (Stage 3): UNVERIFIED — 'born in Sabah and have never set foot in another country' → 'have lived along Sabah's coast for generations'.
CORRECTED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — Reframe '12,000 invisible children' specific anchor → UNICEF's actual Sabah study figure of 18,781 'invisible' children missing from official databases.
REPHRASED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — Regional-comparison line 'among the largest concentrations in SEA' dropped (Stage 3: not verified at SEA-wide scale).

PRESERVED (Stage 3 VERIFIED): UNICEF schooling-exclusion figure; Article 14 conditions; jus soli/sanguinis gap; documentation perpetuation; not party to 1961 Convention; Bajau Laut researcher characterisation; structural exclusion framing.
